nodes.label: AI as communication tone balancer
nodes.label_negative: Direct human communication without tone adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: AI is really good at helping me strike a balance between being upfront and clear, without being avoidant or harsh

nodes.label: AI as collaborative thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate. I might ask the AI to help me write an email and then give broad strokes

nodes.label: AI as substitute for in-person collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: AI has provided another way for me to collaborate when missing the in-person brainstorming

nodes.label: AI as skill enhancer and confidence builder
nodes.label_negative: AI as cause of skill atrophy and laziness
nodes.grounding_span: I have worried that I would become a bit lazy or reliant - but what I actually find is that I'm getting better at things

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and lack of trust
nodes.grounding_span: now that I've developed more trust that it is reliable

nodes.label: AI for personal tone and easy tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for delegated tasks without personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle easy emails, especially ones that I want to be very much in my own tone of voice
